_comment: qeli MAX-OBFUSCATION client profile for the Android app. Import via the app's 'Import' button. Pair with server-maxobf.conf. REQUIRED: paste the server's static public key (qeli show-identity) into auth.server_public_key, and set server.address to your server's IP/host. Password must match the server user (example: testpass123).
name: MaxObf (reality)
